commitment: Ensure all customer prompt data and completions are processed solely within the Germany region (EU Data Boundary) and never transferred to the US
sourceDocument: DPA Exhibit C (Custom Data Residency Rider), Section 1.2
operationalDependency: Frankfurt AWS cluster must be configured to block US model API failovers
requiredAction: Verify that the LLM gateway fails open/closed when Frankfurt APIs are down, instead of failing over to US east endpoints
